QF.id: VI Functions of DP Account Operations_8

question.text: NSDL's IDeAS facility allows investors to view balances and transactions updated with a maximum delay of:

explanation.text: **The Logic:** IDeAS provides balances and transactions updated on an online basis with a delay of maximum 30 minutes. **The Trap:** 'Real-time' would be ideal but IDeAS has a maximum 30-minute lag. **Cross-Exam Context:** Series VII covers real-time vs near-real-time systems in market infrastructure. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** IDeAS was launched January 1, 2004. It allows viewing of transactions for the past 30 days. CMs can also view their CM Pool account balances.
